page_metadata.biotools__summary: Normalization by distributional resampling of high throughput single-cell RNA-sequencing data. Dino is an R package for the normalization of single-cell RNA-seq data using a flexible mixture of negative binomials model of expression.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Normalization by distributional resampling of high throughput single-cell RNA-sequencing data. Dino is an R package for the normalization of single-cell RNA-seq data using a flexible mixture of negative binomials model of expression.
